database_name.description: Lakebase logical database name for this app (one DB per app, shared instance)

lakebase_instance_name.description: Shared Lakebase database instance name (one instance per workspace, many DBs)

dev_catalog.description: Unity Catalog name in dev workspace

prod_catalog.description: Unity Catalog name in prod workspace

audit_catalog.description: UC catalog that holds the central audit.app_events table (shared across apps)

use_obo.description: Does this app need On-Behalf-Of user auth? (yes/no)

enable_branch_per_pr.description: Create a Lakebase branch per PR for safe migration testing? (yes/no)

github_codeowners_team.description: GitHub team (org/slug) that owns deploy + governance files. e.g. hss-platform/platform

github_org_repo.description: GitHub <org>/<repo> for this app (used by drift-detection workflow + setup_branch_protection.py)
